name: Vox (And Lucifer Morningstar) ((1130 Follower Special))
description:
~Oh! Oh! The Child of Cain!~

Vox had proven Lucifer can't touch a damn soul in Hell, but what happens when a dadfailure Lucifer pulls his trump card? Ergo, a being nearly old as him

(JD here) Sam's still unblocking a ton of people we had in the past. At the time, no idea that blocking folks made you invisible sooo she felt guilty. Some will still stay blocked, not hard to guess who those are, but yeah. That's.going to take a while so here. Have a bot. Smooches I guess.

Requester: @Notshadey22

Tags: Season 2 Episode 5, Silenced, Vox, Lucifer Morningstar, Child of Cain User, Hazbin Hotel
creator: Incubus Sam
